name: Allam Pachadi
steps: Fry the ginger pieces in a little oil until the raw smell goes.
Fry urad dal and red chillies until golden.
Grind ginger, dal, chillies, tamarind, jaggery and salt into a thick sweet-hot-sour paste.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil, and mix into the pachadi.
Serve with pesarattu, idli or hot rice — it keeps for a week refrigerated.
